page_metadata.biotools__summary: Pout2Prot converts Percolator output files to protein group and subgroup files using Occam's razor or anti-Occam's razor. These output files can directly be used in Prophane for further downstream taxonomic and functional analysis
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Pout2Prot converts Percolator output files to protein group and subgroup files using Occam's razor or anti-Occam's razor. These output files can directly be used in Prophane for further downstream taxonomic and functional analysis
